title: SceneAudio
description: Voice-over returned from the engine to the capture app for in-ear playback (D4). One complete clip per scene in 1.x; streamed delivery is a future MAJOR version with its own chunk semantics. Playback policy is D9: never overlap; drop if past play_by.

play_by.description: Freshness deadline (D9): if playback has not started by this instant, the app drops the clip (engine default: created_at + 60s).

narration.description: The text being spoken - lets the app show captions without waiting for the viewer.
